paper.title: Candidate Hypervelocity Red Clump Stars in the Galactic Bulge Found Using the VVV and Gaia Surveys

extraction.summary: 论文利用红团簇(RC)巨星在银河系核球中搜寻超高速星。从Gaia DR2+VVV的34颗核球RC星样本中发现7颗VVV自行矢量指向银心方向的候选超高速RC星。Gaia DR2天体测量存在显著excess noise，采用VVV两历元自行。7颗候选体切向速度V_T=5900-17900 km/s，缺乏径向速度待确认。这是首次在银河系核球中发现超高速RC星候选体。

method_chain.summary: Gaia DR2 + VVV PSF photometry cross-match (0.5 arcsec). 34 bulge RC stars selected within -10°<l<10°, -10°<b<5°, 6<d<11 kpc.
outputs: 34 RC star sample with astrometry and photometry

method_chain.summary: Distance estimation via Wesenheit magnitudes (reddening-independent) and Ruiz-Dern+2018 RC calibrations. σD≈0.38 kpc.
Tangential velocity V_T=4.74×D×PM using VVV-derived PMs. Solar reflex motion corrected via gala.
Ejection times T_eject computed from angular distance to GC and VVV PM, assuming constant velocity. Listed in Table 2.
7 HVS candidates selected (PM radiating from within 2° of GC). Estimated production rate N_HVRC=3.26×10^{-4} yr^{-1}. No RVs available for unbound confirmation.

inclusion_assessment.summary: VVV RC 10: PM vector consistent with ejection from Galactic centre. V_T=7317.575 km/s, d=7394.923 pc, T_eject=24554.129 yr. Gaia DR2 astrometry flagged with significant excess noise; VVV-derived PM used. Candidate hypervelocity red clump star in the Galactic bulge. No RV available — follow-up needed to confirm unbound status.
inclusion_assessment.confidence_reason: Candidate selected based on PM vector radiating from Galactic centre within 2°. Paper explicitly treats as HVS candidate but notes no RV available for orbit confirmation. Gaia DR2 astrometric excess noise makes Gaia PM unreliable.

source_refs.context: Selection: 7 stars that radiate from the Galactic centre
Tab table2: Candidate HVS with V_T and T_eject
Paper abstract: discovery of 7 candidate HVS RC stars

origin_site.description: PM vectors traced back to within 2° of Galactic centre

extra.name: proper_motion_total
extra.description: Total proper motion from VVV (epoch 2010-2015). Gaia DR2 PM unreliable due to astrometric excess noise.

candidate_groups_considered.description: 7颗VVV自行矢量指向银心方向(2°范围内)的核球RC星候选体(ID: 10,15,17,19,20,22,23)。Gaia DR2存在显著astrometric excess noise，VVV两历元(2010-2015)自行更可靠。缺乏径向速度。
candidate_groups_considered.reason: 论文明确称其为'candidate hypervelocity stars'。7颗全部纳入。V_T范围5900-17900 km/s远超典型银盘恒星速度。

source_refs.context: Selection: 7 stars that radiate from the Galactic centre
Tab table2: Candidate HVS with V_T and T_eject

candidate_groups_considered.description: 全部34颗核球RC星。7颗HVS候选体+27颗非候选体。
candidate_groups_considered.reason: 27颗非候选体RC星PM矢量未指向银心方向，不符合论文HVS选择标准。

source_refs.context: Tab table1: Gaia and VVV Photometry of Bulge RC Stars
7 stars that radiate from the Galactic centre
